name: AsunaTracks Sync
description: Sync Seanime AniList progress and list changes to AsunaTracks.
author: AsunaTracks
notes: Sign in with your AsunaTracks account from the tray, then use manual sync or live sync from Seanime list updates.

networkAccess.reasoning: Required to authenticate with AsunaTracks and sync the current user's anime and manga list through the public API.
